channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Barry Manilow Postpones May Las Vegas Shows Amid Cancer Recovery
item.description: Sending love and healing vibes to Barry Manilow 💖 Wishing him a speedy recovery! 🌟 #BarryManilow #GetWellSoon

item.title: Record Store Day 2026’s Top Sellers: Taylor Swift, Pink Floyd, Bruno Mars & More
item.description: 🎶 Vinyl vibes for days! 🌟 Taylor Swift, Pink Floyd, Bruno Mars, and more topping the charts at Record Store Day 2026! 🎉 #VinylRevival

item.title: Post Malone Postpones Start of Stadium Tour with Jelly Roll, Cancels Several Dates Outright
item.description: Post Malone pumpin' the breaks on tour plans 🚌🛑 Wishing him a quick comeback to the stage! 🎤✨ #PostponedNotCanceled

item.title: Ice Spice Stars in Spicy Wendy’s Ad Following McDonald’s Scuffle: Watch
item.description: 🌟 Spice up your day with Ice Spice in this sizzling Wendy’s ad! 🔥 Watch the spicy showdown now! 🍔🎶 #MusicNews

item.title: Lady Gaga Shares More The Devil Wears Prada 2 Songs, “Shape Of A Woman” & “Glamorous Life”
item.description: 🔥 Lady Gaga drops two new tracks for The Devil Wears Prada 2: "Shape Of A Woman" & "Glamorous Life"! 🎶✨ #NewMusicAlert
